Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Hyla Breidenbaugh and Jeremiah Rushig-Hart's Motion to Reconsider Imposition of Sanctions issued on 2/25/2009 to Kenneth Greenstein in the amount of $250.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed.
